scripts.dev: concurrently "python -m uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir backend --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4000" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.pages:preview: npm run build && npx wrangler pages dev frontend/dist
scripts.pages:deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy frontend/dist --project-name avareno
scripts.typecheck: python -m compileall -q backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
